---
id: android-keystore-file-list
title: "Get a list of the android keystore files"
description: "List all the android keystore files that have been uploaded to a specific app."
sidebar_label: "Get a list of the android keystore files"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a list of the android keystore files"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/android-keystore-files"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the android keystore files that have been uploaded to a specific app.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
